ddl.value: ("text_input_units" is null or "text_input_units" >= 0) and ("image_input_units" is null or "image_input_units" >= 0) and ("output_units" is null or "output_units" >= 0)
ddl.name: provider_requests_units_nonnegative

ddl.value: ("operation_type" = 'scene_analysis' and "analysis_run_id" is not null and "image_generation_id" is null) or ("operation_type" = 'scene_image_generation' and "analysis_run_id" is null and "image_generation_id" is not null)
ddl.name: usage_reservations_single_operation
